title: Hiring, matched.
description: Title slide — AVANA Recruit, the UK's AI-native job matching platform.

title: The Problem
description: UK hiring is slow, expensive, and miscalibrated.

title: The Solution
description: Six dimensions of fit, one AI engine.

title: The Six Dimensions
description: Skills, experience, preferences, credentials, location, education.

title: How it works · Candidates
description: Sign up, upload CV, get matched.

title: How it works · Companies
description: Post a role, AI surfaces fit, interview and hire.

title: Every candidate is verified
description: Identity, education, and employment history confirmed before any match.

title: Early results
description: Pilot metrics — time to interview, match accuracy, cost per hire.

title: Market opportunity
description: A £43B UK recruitment market with an £11B SAM.

title: Why now
description: Three forces converging in 2026 — AI maturity, labour-market shift, CV trust collapse.

title: 2026 roadmap
description: Quarterly milestones — pilot, employer dashboard, interview agent, EU expansion.

title: Hiring, finally matched.
description: Closing slide with brand mark and contact details.
